_doc: cognitive 축 sub-SSOT — 부모: ../_index.json (cognitive 키). 자동 생성 2026-04-12.

_meta._honesty_note: _verified_count / _alien_index_avg: 도메인별 alien_index 소스 부재로 null (자기참조 금지 — 추후 atlas.n6 혹은 _registry 집계 시 갱신)

_changelog: 1.0.0 (2026-04-12): cognitive 축 sub-SSOT 신설. 전체 21개 도메인 등록.
1.1.0 (2026-04-16): AI 비즈니스 5개 도메인 추가 (agent-serving, eval-pipeline, inference-cost, quality-scale, training-cost).
1.2.0 (2026-04-16): AI Safety 6 + ai-consciousness 1 = 7개 도메인 추가 등록.

1.4.0 (2026-04-20): AI Fellows 8-domain Mk.V 승격. 7 AI 비즈니스(inference/training/quality/agent/enterprise/eval/consciousness) + ai-safety(통합) status→mk5, has_verify→true, tier=Mk.V, BT-1421~1428 연결. ai-safety 신규 등록 (총 35개).

1.5.0 (2026-05-01): cognitive axis 36th domain youth-ai-labeling-rlhf-hub registered (South Africa applied-tech bet #4 from proposals/south-africa-applied-tech.md row 4; consumer service-business surface for premium-tier AI training data labelling + RLHF preference-pair production at 200-1000-seat Cape Town/Johannesburg/Durban hubs targeting domain-expert + multilingual tail Zulu/Xhosa/Afrikaans/Sotho/Tswana on EU/UK 2-3 hr time-zone overlap; alien-grade 10 PHYSICAL-LIMIT). Physical-limit anchors: Cohen 1960 inter-annotator agreement kappa (expert >= 0.80 / multilingual >= 0.70 per Landis-Koch 1977) + Bai-Anthropic 2022 Constitutional AI RLHF data efficiency (50k preference-pair sufficiency, 50-day delivery at 1k pairs/day mk1 throughput, USD 5-15/pair SA wage arbitrage vs USD 10-30 US) + Mielke 2019 Zipf low-resource language scarcity (Zulu/Xhosa speech corpora < 100h vs English 100,000h+ → 50-100x data-scarcity premium) + Shannon 1948 information-theoretic annotation bit floor (6-10 bits/expert sample, 50-150 bits/RLHF pair) + SAT-3+WACS submarine-cable Cape Town-Frankfurt RTT ~150ms (sufficient for async queue-based annotation; 8 hr/day EU/UK overlap) + Eskom 2024 EAF ~54% (PV 100 kWp DC + LFP 768 kWh battery 12-hr autonomy required for 200-seat hub 64 kW continuous load). 6 precursors cognitive/ai-multimodal + cognitive/ai-quality-scale + cognitive/ai-eval-pipeline + cognitive/ai-alignment + cognitive/cognitive-social-psychology + energy/power-grid. F-RLHF-MVP-1..5 90-day + year-1 falsifier gates 2026-09-30 (expert-tier wage premium + Eskom load-shedding) + 2026-12-31 (multilingual kappa + SA YES tax break renewal) + 2027-03-31 (customer churn). Design-by-physics per own#32, NOT n=6 force-fit. cognitive axis count 35 → 36; alien-grade 10 PHYSICAL-LIMIT.

domains.note: 171종 통합 설계 (해석/정렬/강건/배포/멀티모달/복지). v3-특이점 SINGULARITY 6/6 PASS + Mk.V

domains.chip_p2_4_result: brainwire 3 lenses 연결 + 6채널 n=6 매핑 5/6 EXACT + 15/15 도메인 검증

physical_limit_anchors.bai_2022_constitutional_ai: 50k preference pairs sufficient for production-grade RLHF; SA wage-arbitrage USD 5-15/pair vs US USD 10-30/pair
physical_limit_anchors.mielke_2019_zipf_low_resource: Zulu/Xhosa speech corpora < 100h vs English 100,000h+ → 50-100x data-scarcity premium
physical_limit_anchors.shannon_1948_information_theoretic: expert tasks 6-10 bits/sample (log_2 K for K=64-1024 classes); RLHF 50-150 bits/pair including rationale
physical_limit_anchors.sat3_wacs_rtt: Cape Town-Frankfurt ~150ms; sufficient for async queue annotation; EU/UK 8 hr/day overlap
physical_limit_anchors.eskom_eaf_pv_battery: Eskom 2024 EAF ~54% requires PV 100 kWp DC + LFP 768 kWh 12-hr autonomy for 200-seat 64 kW continuous load

precursors: energy/power-grid (Eskom EAF + PV+battery backup; cross-link rooftop-pv-2nd-life-microgrid SA-portfolio sister)
falsifiers: F-RLHF-MVP-1 (2026-09-30): expert-tier gross wage < USD 1,000/mo at 200-seat pilot → retract premium-tier unit-economics
F-RLHF-MVP-2 (2026-12-31): inter-annotator Cohen kappa < 0.7 on multilingual tasks → retract quality claim
F-RLHF-MVP-3 (2027-03-31): customer churn > 30% in year 1 → retract demand-durability claim
F-RLHF-MVP-4 (2026-12-31): SA YES tax break expires without renewal → retract economic model
F-RLHF-MVP-5 (2026-09-30): Eskom load-shedding > 8 hr/day AND PV+battery cannot cover gap → retract operations-continuity claim

_note: cognitive 축 전체 멤버 목록은 ../_index.json cognitive 키 SSOT 를 따른다 (중복 등록 금지).
